name: taskMaster-todoist-mcp
description: A lightweight Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables natural language interaction with your Todoist tasks directly from your IDE. Built with simplicity and maintainability in mind.

name: kindlegpt-notesenhancer
description: A Python script that automates the extraction, enhancement, and storage of Kindle book notes in Obsidian via Google Drive, streamlining the note-taking process for Kindle users.

name: weld-anomaly-detection
description: A Welding Anomaly Detection system using unsupervised Machine Learning and statistical analysis to identify anomalies in welding process curves.

name: Federated-Distributed-ML-Traffic-Prediction
description: Implementation and evaluation of federated and distributed machine learning approaches for traffic prediction. This repository includes models, datasets, and results for assessing the effectiveness of these techniques in real-time traffic forecasting.

name: smart_chatbot_amazon_review
description: A chatbot web app to analyze Amazon Fashion reviews that provides a natural and intuitive conversational experience, allowing users to explore customer reviews, identify trends, and understand what makes a great customer experience.

name: topic_modelling_users_feedbacks
description: Analyzes streaming service user feedback using NLP clustering (BERT & NMF) to identify and prioritize common issues from customer reports.
